adrs.title: Ports and adapters — domain must not depend on infrastructure
adrs.content:
# 0007 — Ports and adapters

Status: accepted

## Decision
The domain layer defines ports (abstract interfaces) in terms of domain types only. It MUST NOT import SQLAlchemy, sessions, or ORM models. Adapters in persistence/ implement the ports and translate to/from ORM. Swapping the database must not touch domain code.
